creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Muhammad Moinur Rahman wrote on 19.04.2012 01:18:
>> Number:         167075
>> Category:       ports
>> Synopsis:       [PATCH] www/py27-Products.CMFPlone: update to 4.1.4

Hi Muhammad,

before you go further with PR's, I want be sure that you know about 
version pinning for plone 4.1.4:

http://dist.plone.org/release/4.1.4/versions.cfg

Plone is quite fragile on dependencies versions, so they all should be 
updated at once and to particular ones that is listed in versions.cfg 
and only after throughout testing on live plone installation, so you 
can't just update it to latest version and expect that nothing will be 
broken with it.

I'm on my half-way to updating plone to 4.1.4 (and adding plone 
"metaport") but still need some time to finish and test.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
